name: chave-mestra-oraculo
description: PROACTIVELY activate for: 1. User says 'mapeia a persona', 'forja da persona', 'quem é meu lead', 'descreve meu público'; 2. User wants to map the deep psychological states of their avatar (Inferno, Purgatório, Paraíso/Céu); 3. User says 'alma da persona', 'inferno particular', 'pesquisa de avatar', 'mapeamento de avatar'; 4. User needs SZC (Status Quo, Zeitgeist, Conclusão — never call it pesquisa de mercado); 5. User wants to understand what drives, pains, and aspires their ideal client before creating copy or content; 6. User says 'cria a persona do nicho X', 'o que meu avatar sente', 'qual é o inferno do meu cliente'; 7. User is about to create a sales page, copy, or campaign and needs persona psychological depth first.
